audit_items.proof_trace: ldap_is_write_ready dereferences ld->ld_selectinfo without NULL check. This pointer is initialized in ldap_open but can become NULL during ldap_unbind or due to allocation failure. No lock protects concurrent access between ldap_unbind and ldap_is_write_ready.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Multi-threaded client: thread A calls ldap_unbind freeing ld_selectinfo while thread B concurrently executes ldap_result calling ldap_is_write_ready, causing NULL pointer dereference and crash.
